name: Aurora H1 Wireless Headphones
description: Studio-grade 40mm drivers, hybrid active noise cancellation, and up to 36 hours of playback on a single charge. Memory-foam earcups with a featherweight aluminium frame for all-day comfort. Bluetooth 5.3 with multi-point pairing.
highlights: Up to 36h battery life (24h with ANC)

skus.description: The Black / Standard finish is our most discreet option: a soft-touch matte shell that hides fingerprints on the commute. The Standard headband keeps weight low while the 40mm drivers deliver the same hybrid ANC and transparency mode as every H1.

Black / Pro adds a wider suspension strap and deeper memory-foam ear cushions for longer sessions. The Pro hinge is steel-reinforced—same stealth look as Standard, but tuned for creators who wear headphones all day.

White / Standard pairs a clean porcelain shell with the slimmer Standard frame—great for minimal desks and bright studios. The light finish uses an anti-yellowing UV coating so it stays crisp over time.

White / Pro combines the bright studio aesthetic with Pro comfort: thicker ear cushions and a wider headband spread pressure evenly. When back in stock, this is the variant our mastering engineers pick most often.
highlights: Hybrid ANC tuned for long sessions

skus.description: Blue / Standard is the playful option: a saturated cobalt housing with the same compact Standard geometry. Slightly higher price reflects the limited colour run and extra anodisation step on the aluminium yokes.
highlights: Same driver + ANC stack as Black

skus.description: Blue / Pro is the flagship look: bold cobalt with the full Pro comfort kit—deeper pads, wider strap, and reinforced hinge. If you want the colour to stand out and the longest-wear comfort, this is the SKU.
highlights: Best match for all-day wear + travel
